hero.title: E.A. Elite
hero.subtitle: Trading Group
hero.desc: A diversified international trading conglomerate bridging Asia and the world through innovation, trust, and operational excellence.
about.heading: A diversified international trading conglomerate headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand
about.body: E.A. Elite Trading Group operates across multiple sectors including agricultural trading, seafood, minerals, hospitality, and plantation agriculture. With over 25 years of experience, we bridge markets across Asia and the Middle East.
divisions.intro: Six interlinked business divisions powering growth across Asia and beyond.
divisions.1.name: Agricultural Trading
divisions.1.tagline: Yellow maize, bulk commodities, and agricultural products across Asia
divisions.2.name: Seafood Trading
divisions.2.tagline: Premium frozen seafood sourced from Myanmar's Ayeyarwady region
divisions.3.name: Minerals & Metals
divisions.3.tagline: Copper cathode, ores, and metal trading across international markets
divisions.4.name: Budget Hotels
divisions.4.tagline: Affordable hospitality properties across Bangkok, Thailand
divisions.5.name: Restaurant & F&B
divisions.5.tagline: The Coffee Ville and shabu restaurant partnerships
divisions.6.name: Plantation Agriculture
divisions.6.tagline: Minn's Fresh Farm — strawberries, preserves, and wine from Myanmar
global.heading: Connecting 5 countries across Asia and the Middle East
japan.heading: Expanding into the Japanese Market
japan.desc: E.A. Elite is actively seeking partners, investors, and B2B opportunities to bring premium Asian agricultural products and seafood to the Japanese market.
japan.partners.desc: Seeking distribution and retail partners across Japan
japan.investors.desc: Investment opportunities in premium Asian trade routes
japan.b2b.desc: Wholesale supply of agricultural and seafood products
japan.form.name: Full Name
whoweare.values.innovation.desc: Pioneering new approaches to international trade, leveraging technology and market insights to create competitive advantages.
whoweare.values.trust.desc: Building lasting relationships through transparency, reliability, and integrity across all business dealings.
whoweare.values.growth.desc: Continuously expanding our reach, capabilities, and partnerships to deliver greater value to stakeholders.
whoweare.founder.name: Dr. Minn Zaw
whoweare.founder.title: Founder & Managing Director
whoweare.timeline.1.title: Early Career
whoweare.timeline.1.desc: Started in trading as Local Manager, building foundational expertise in commodities.
whoweare.timeline.2.title: Regional Leadership
whoweare.timeline.2.desc: Appointed Asia Pacific Manager, leading multi-country trading operations.
whoweare.timeline.3.title: Entrepreneurship
whoweare.timeline.3.desc: Founded Medi-Tech Biz (Thailand) in 2008, expanding into healthcare and trading.
whoweare.timeline.4.title: Group MD
whoweare.timeline.4.desc: Managing Director for the entire E.A. Elite Trading Group across 5 countries.
whoweare.vision.title: Our Vision
whoweare.vision.text: To be the partner of choice for trading between Asia and Europe.
whoweare.mission.title: Our Mission
whoweare.mission.text: To become the top business partner bridging Asia and the world.
whoweare.forces.1.title: Market Knowledge
whoweare.forces.1.desc: Deep expertise in Asian commodity markets, trade routes, and regulatory environments built over 25+ years.
whoweare.forces.2.title: Risk Awareness
whoweare.forces.2.desc: Proactive risk management across supply chains, currencies, and geopolitical landscapes.
whoweare.forces.3.title: Operational Excellence
whoweare.forces.3.desc: Efficient logistics, quality control, and compliance systems ensuring reliable delivery every time.
trading.heading: Operating Efficiently, Leading with Innovation
trading.overview: E.A. Elite Trading operates import and export operations across Thailand, Myanmar, Singapore, Japan, and the UAE. Our commodity trading spans agriculture, seafood, and minerals.
trading.agri.maize.title: Yellow Maize
trading.agri.maize.desc: Premium quality yellow maize sourced from trusted suppliers across Southeast Asia. Exported in bulk to meet growing demand across Asian and Middle Eastern markets.
trading.agri.commodities.title: Agricultural Commodities
trading.agri.commodities.desc: A diverse range of agricultural products including rice, pulses, and oilseeds, traded through established networks spanning multiple countries.
trading.agri.bulk.title: Bulk Goods
trading.agri.bulk.desc: Large-volume trading of agricultural raw materials with efficient logistics and competitive pricing for wholesale buyers.
trading.seafood.rohu.title: Frozen Rohu Fish
trading.seafood.rohu.desc: Premium frozen Rohu fish sourced from Myanmar's Ayeyarwady river system. Processed and packed under strict quality controls for export markets.
trading.seafood.products.title: Seafood Products
trading.seafood.products.desc: A variety of frozen and processed seafood products meeting international food safety standards for distribution across Asia.
trading.seafood.coldchain.title: Cold Chain Logistics
trading.seafood.coldchain.desc: End-to-end cold chain management ensuring product freshness from source to destination across international borders.
trading.minerals.ores.title: Minerals & Ores
trading.minerals.ores.desc: Trading in high-demand minerals and ores sourced from verified mines, meeting international quality and compliance standards.
trading.minerals.copper.title: Copper Cathode
trading.minerals.copper.desc: Grade-A copper cathode trading for industrial buyers, with reliable supply chains and competitive market pricing.
trading.minerals.metals.title: Metal Trading
trading.minerals.metals.desc: Comprehensive metal trading services covering ferrous and non-ferrous metals across Asian and international markets.
hospitality.heading: Comfort, Culture, and Community
hospitality.hotels.title: Budget Hotels
hospitality.hotels.desc: Affordable, well-maintained hospitality properties across Bangkok, providing comfortable stays for business and leisure travelers.
hospitality.coffee.title: The Coffee Ville
hospitality.coffee.desc: A vibrant coffee shop brand offering premium brews and a welcoming atmosphere for the local community.
hospitality.restaurant.title: Shabu & Hotpot
hospitality.restaurant.desc: Restaurant partnerships specializing in shabu-shabu and hotpot dining experiences with premium ingredients.
plantation.heading: From Highland Fields to Global Tables
plantation.story: Minn's Fresh Farm, nestled in the highlands of Myanmar, cultivates premium strawberries using sustainable farming practices. From field to table, every product is crafted with care.
plantation.strawberries.title: Fresh Strawberries
plantation.strawberries.desc: Hand-picked premium strawberries grown in the cool highland climate of Myanmar.
plantation.preserves.title: Artisanal Preserves
plantation.preserves.desc: Small-batch strawberry preserves made from the freshest harvest, perfect for export markets.
plantation.wine.title: Strawberry Wine
plantation.wine.desc: Unique artisanal strawberry wine crafted from our farm's finest produce.
